title: carex subnigricans
intro: Carex subnigricans, also known as the black sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as a natural remedy for urinary problems. Carex subnigricans is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
